column1: The printer____________with the computer at the previous lesson. (USE)
We____________the printer with the computer next time. (USE)
Party invitations_______usually__________by the secretary. She is responsible for that. (SEND)
When I entered the classroom they____________the invitations. (PRINT)
We can go to the zoo in the morning or in the evening. The animals________twice a day. (FEED)
Let's meet at the front door. The animals_____________after 6 o'clock. We'll watch them. (FEED)
The lions are not hungry. They______________an hour ago. (FEED)
